Oracle Events
OE1: Search email for coordinator emergency or leave notifications using `search_emails` (query: "emergency" or "leave" or "family" or similar) to discover Suki Patel's emergency leave email with the handoff details for all 8 moves.
OE2: Search email for vendor equipment or truck failure notifications using `search_emails` (query: "flatbed" or "truck" or "out of service" or "transmission" or similar) to discover the Heartland Movers flatbed breakdown email from Lisa Kwan.
OE3: Search email for invoice reconciliation or discrepancy notifications using `search_emails` (query: "invoice" or "reconciliation" or "discrepancy" or similar) to discover Hana Kim's email detailing the 4 billing mismatches.
OE4: Search Slack for the coordinator leave announcement using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "emergency" or "leave" or "coordinator" or similar) to find Suki's #operations message and the coordinator capacity responses.
OE5: Pull the coordinator availability thread using `conversations_replies` (channel_id: "C006", thread_ts: discovered from Suki's parent message) to read Blessing's, Fatimah's, and Javier's capacity responses about which moves they can absorb.
OE6: Search Slack for the billing discrepancy flag using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "invoice" or "discrepancy" or "billing" or similar) to find Hana's #finance message.
OE7: Pull #finance channel history using `conversations_history` (channel_id: "C005") to read the full context of the invoice reconciliation discussion.
OE8: Search Airtable for the coordinator on leave's relocation assignments using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Suki Patel") to enumerate all 8 active moves with statuses, dates, and constraints.
OE9: Search Airtable for other coordinators' relocation loads using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Fatimah Al-Rashidi") to assess Fatimah's current workload.
OE10: Search Airtable for Blessing's load using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Blessing Okafor") to assess Blessing's current workload.
OE11: Search Airtable for Javier's load using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Javier Morales") to assess Javier's current workload.
OE12: Search Airtable for the oversize/equipment moves affected by the flatbed issue using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Joaquín Reyes" or "Keiko Tanaka" or similar — names discovered from Lisa Kwan's Heartland email which identifies the GreenStack solar rig and Mosaic industrial shipment to Seattle) to verify affected relocation records and their details.
OE13: Search QuickBooks for the Simone Richter invoice using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: matching "Richter" or "INV-2026-0412-RICHTER" or similar) to verify the premature billing.
OE14: Search QuickBooks for the Camille Oduya invoice using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: matching "Oduya" or "INV-2026-0412-ODUYA" or similar) to verify the premature billing.
OE15: Search QuickBooks for a Dr. Renata Kovacs invoice using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: matching "Kovacs" or "Renata" or similar) to confirm the missing invoice.
OE16: Search QuickBooks for the Deshawn Hartley draft invoice using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: matching "Hartley" or "INV-2026-0414" or similar) to verify the unapproved $750 surcharge.
OE17: Search Airtable for Simone Richter's relocation record using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Simone Richter") to cross reference against the QuickBooks invoice.
OE18: Search Airtable for Camille Oduya's relocation record using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Camille Oduya") to cross reference against the QuickBooks invoice.
OE19: Search Airtable for Dr. Renata Kovacs's relocation record using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Kovacs" or "Renata Kovacs") to verify the relocation status (Airtable shows Completed, consistent with Hana's email) and confirm no standalone QuickBooks invoice exists for this move.
OE20: Search Airtable for Deshawn Hartley's relocation record using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Deshawn Hartley") to verify the estimated cost vs draft invoice.
OE21: Search Linear for existing tracking issues using `linear_list_issues` (query: "redistribution" or "Suki" or "coordinator" or similar) to find the coordinator redistribution tracking issue.
OE22: Search Linear for the Heartland flatbed issue using `linear_list_issues` (query: "flatbed" or "Heartland" or "oversize" or similar) to find the flatbed tracking issue.
OE23: Search contacts for the affected moving vendor using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Heartland" or "Lisa Kwan") to get the email address for the flatbed timeline inquiry.
OE24: Search contacts for the alternative long distance vendor using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Swift" or "Greg Pallone") to get the email address for the oversize capacity inquiry.
OE25: Search contacts for coordinators' emails using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Fatimah" or "Blessing" or "Javier") to get email addresses for handoff meeting invites.
OE26: Check calendar for coordinator availability using `calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to` (start_datetime: "2026-04-14", end_datetime: "2026-04-21") to find scheduling conflicts before creating handoff meetings.
OE27: Update Airtable relocation records with new coordinator assignments using `airtable_update_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: array of record updates changing Assigned Coordinator field from "Suki Patel" to the assigned coordinator).
OE28: Create Linear tracking issues for each reassigned move using `linear_create_issue` (team: "team_operations", title: tracking title per reassigned move, description: handoff notes, assignee: new coordinator, priority: based on deadline urgency).
OE29: Post redistribution plan in #operations using `conversations_add_message` (channel_id: "C006", payload: summary of all 8 reassignments with new coordinator, move details, and critical deadlines).
OE30: Send email to Heartland Movers about the flatbed timeline using `send_email` (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["lisa.kwan@heartlandmovers.com"], subject and content asking for revised repair timeline and affected move list).
OE31: Send email to Swift Relocations about oversize capacity using `send_email` (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com"], subject and content asking about availability for oversize/flatbed loads in the April 14 to 30 window).
OE32: Post billing discrepancy report in #finance using `conversations_add_message` (channel_id: "C005", payload: summary of all 4 discrepancies with corrections needed, Richter billed but In Progress, Oduya billed but In Progress, Kovacs completed but no invoice, Hartley unapproved $750 surcharge).
OE33: Create calendar events for coordinator handoff meetings using `calendar_add_calendar_event` (title, start_datetime, end_datetime, attendees for each coordinator receiving reassigned moves, Fatimah, Blessing, and Javier).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
